docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DUCKWALD, PATRICK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BROWNE, DENNIS $435.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $455.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $435.00 FILED BY DUCKWALD, PATRICK AS TO DEFENDANT BROWNE, DENNIS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-05-2000 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DUCKWALD, PATRICK HEARING SET FOR FEB-02-2000 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
DEBTOR'S REQUEST FOR SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT BROWNE, DENNIS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BROWNE, DENNIS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DUCKWALD, PATRICK IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BROWNE, DENNIS PROOF OF SERVICE WAIVED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF FEB-02-2000, GRANTED
DEBTOR'S REQUEST FOR SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT GRANTED AS TO DEFENDANT BROWNE, DENNIS
